Notes: Single UPDATE carries two identical add_rr operations for the same owner/type/class/TTL/rdata. The zone pre-seeds the target RR so implementations that treat the second add as YXRRSET-like or otherwise reject duplicate insertions can diverge from implementations that coalesce duplicates and return NOERROR. The follow-up QUERY observes whether the RRset is present unchanged.

Steps.Description: Issue one UPDATE with two identical add_rr operations for dup.campus.edu. A 198.51.100.7 and no prerequisites.

Steps.Name: dup.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe the post-state of the touched RRset.
